markdown.markdown:
This page documents how your existing 485 slides (across 6 PPTX files, originally architected as a math-first course) are redeployed across the 32 sessions of the Path C two-track architecture.

## Summary

| Total existing slides | 485 |
|---|---|
| Direct reuse (minimal adaptation) | ~190 (39%) |
| Conceptual adaptation (strip math/derivations) | ~80 (16%) |
| Track 2 deep dive (full math, original form) | ~140 (29%) |
| Appendix / reference only | ~75 (15%) |
| **New slides to create** | **~200–280** |
| **Estimated build time for new slides** | **80–120 hours** |

## Total Count

| Category | Slides |
|---|---|
| Existing slides directly reused (minimal adaptation) | ~165 |
| Existing slides reused with conceptual adaptation | ~80 |
| Existing slides reused in Track 2 (original form) | ~140 |
| Existing slides moved to Appendix A | ~75 (Classes 1–4) |
| Existing slides discarded | ~25 (mostly Class 32) |
| **New slides needed** | **~243** |

## What Gets Built When

For a Spring 2027 delivery with 14 months of runway, suggested build sequence:

| Month | Build target | Hours estimate |
|---|---|---|
| 1–2 | Sessions 1–8 new content (all of Unit 1 + most of Unit 2) | 40 hr |
| 3 | Sessions 19–24 math intuition bridges | 30 hr |
| 4 | Adapt Sessions 11–18 (light editing of existing slides) | 10 hr |
| 5 | Track-specific Session 25–31 prep (mostly reuse) | 15 hr |
| 6 | Problem set writing (8 PSets) | 20 hr |
| 7 | Midterm and project rubric refinement | 8 hr |
| 8–10 | Pilot dry-run + iteration on weak sessions | 20 hr |
| 11–14 | Polish, recording prep, platform integration | 15 hr |
| **Total** | | **~158 hr** |

Spread across 14 months at ~3 hr/week, this is realistic alongside your other work.
